summary: Tested 'A Note' free-form text post feature and Bingo countdown strip. Backend: 16/16 tests PASS. Frontend: All A Note UI elements verified. Bingo active countdown NOT testable - card is currently LOCKED (expired).

not_testable_due_to_state: Bingo active countdown strip (data-testid='bingo-active-countdown') - Card is LOCKED, will appear when new card generated on Friday 9am UTC

seed_data_creation: Multiple NOTE posts created via backend tests for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both 'A Note' and Bingo countdown features verified. A Note feature: all 12 specified features tested and working (composer chip, modal, 280 char limit, optional record tag, optional image, submit button states, no badge on feed). Bingo: Card is LOCKED (expired Feb 27 - Mar 2), so active countdown strip (data-testid='bingo-active-countdown') cannot be tested. The active countdown appears ABOVE the card when active and shows 'card locks in X' with urgency styling under 24h and seconds under 1h. Auto-refresh on countdown zero triggers fetchBingo(). Daily Prompt 'buzz in' was already answered by demo user, so could not verify it opens Now Spinning composer (not A Note).

composer_chip.styling: Outlined pill with border, transparent background

backend_api.model: NoteCreate (text required, record_id optional, image_url optional)
backend_api.validation: text required, max 280 chars, invalid record_id returns 404

bingo_active_countdown.urgency_styling: Under 24h: amber border/time, Under 1h: shows seconds
bingo_active_countdown.code_verified: Lines 98-124 in CollectorBingo.js implement active countdown with urgency styling
